zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret d'Anyers於大約1353年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布拉德利 格林時，她的父親Thomas d'Anvers III19歲，母親Isabel de Baguley30歲。她於1365年與John Savage在英國英格蘭爾黑阿德爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和10個女兒的父母。她去世於1428年6月24日在英國爾克里夫頓享年76歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾馬可萊斯費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret d'Anyers于大约1353年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾布拉德利 格林时，她的父亲Thomas d'Anvers III19岁，母亲Isabel de Baguley30岁。她于1365年与John Savage在英国英格兰爾黑阿德爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和10个女儿的父母。她去世于1428年6月24日在英国爾克里夫頓享年76岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾馬可萊斯費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: d'Anyers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Leicestershire): of Norman origin, a habitational name with fused preposition d(e) for someone from Anvers, the French name of the port of Antwerp in what is now Belgium.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret d'Anyers was born about 1353, in Bradley Green, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas d'Anvers III, was 19 and her mother, Isabel de Baguley, was 30. She married John Savage in 1365, in Cheadle, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 10 daughters. She died on 24 June 1428, in Clifton, Cheshire, England, at the age of 76, and was buried in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret d'Anyers est née environ 1353, à Bradley Green, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas d'Anvers III, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Baguley, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé John Savage en 1365, à Cheadle, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 10 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 juin 1428, à Clifton, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Macclesfield, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret d'Anyersが約1353年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブラドリー グレンで生まれた時，父Thomas d'Anvers IIIは19歳，母Isabel de Baguleyは30歳であった。1365年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェアドルでJohn Savageと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。彼女は1428年6月24日にイギリスチェシュアイアクリフトンで76歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアマククレスフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret d'Anyers(이)가 대략 1353년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 브래들리 그린에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas d'Anvers III(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel de Baguley(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1365년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체아들일에서 John Savage(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1428년 6월 24일 영국 체실르 클리프턴에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 맥클스필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret d'Anyers nasceu aproximadamente 1353, em Bradley Green, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas d'Anvers III, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Baguley, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com John Savage em 1365, em Cheadle, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 10 filhas. Ela faleceu em 24 de junho de 1428, em Clifton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 76 anos, e foi sepultada em Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret d'Anyers родилась около 1353 г. в местности брадли грин, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas d'Anvers III было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Baguley, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Savage в 1365 г. в местности чидл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 10 дочерей. Она умерла 24 июня 1428 г. в местности клифтон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности макклесфиелд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.
